name: nexus-pos
description: Nexus POS - Point of Sale System

scripts.build: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend-react && npm install && npm run build
scripts.setup: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm run migrate
scripts.render-build: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend-react && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf backend/dist && cp -r frontend-react/dist backend/dist && cd backend && node manual_schema.js
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend-react && npm install

author: Zion Groceries
